commentary_text: The model sees Ecuador as a strong favorite at 55%, but the sportsbook consensus pulls back to 37%, a 18-percentage-point gap favoring the model's conviction. The market also elevates Ivory Coast's chances to 29% from the model's 17%, suggesting bookmakers are hedging against the possibility of recent form shifts, lineup changes, or injury absences that could strengthen Ivory Coast or weaken Ecuador from their underlying rating. Because the model lacks access to current team news while the market incorporates real-time information flows, this divergence flags genuine uncertainty about squad composition and recent performance rather than disagreement on which team is stronger.
